Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface ISimpleVisitor2

All Superinterfaces:
ISimpleVisitor
All Known Implementing Classes:
AssignmentUpgrader, DefaultSimpleVisitor, PredicateDecomposer, PredicateHeightComputer, TestSimpleVisitor.TestVisitor2, WDComputer, WDImprover
public interface ISimpleVisitor2 extends ISimpleVisitor
This interface extends ISimpleVisitor to add support for predicate variables.
Since:
1.2
See Also:
